category_sources: source_facts.description says C interpreter for scripting; official GitLab README describes PicoC as a very small C interpreter for scripting.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is picoc; official GitLab README names the project PicoC.
docs_sources: Official GitLab README is the best official documentation surface found for PicoC.
